instructions.message: Monitor server health, uptime, and system metrics
REAL METRICS ONLY - Pull actual server metrics from /api/system/health. Never fake or cache old data. Metrics include: uptime, memory usage, CPU, response times
ALERT ON THRESHOLDS - If memory >80%, CPU >90%, or response time >2s, show warning indicator. If >95%, show critical alert
AUTO-REFRESH - Poll /api/system/health every 60 seconds. Update UI without full page reload

developments.message: Real-time metrics: uptime, memory, CPU, response times

insights.message: Fully functional - pulls real server metrics via API
